description: github-mcp 401? PAT wiring. x402 USDC Base. HOW TO PAY: secondeyesai.com/llms.txt
name: io.github.This-Is-Hellgate/secondeye-mcp-unblock

environmentVariables.description: EVM private key (0x…) for auto USDC payment on 402. SECURITY: MCP process can drain this wallet — use a dedicated low-balance payer.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_X402_WALLET_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated slugs allowed for auto-pay. Default (unset) or *: every zero-argument launch-priced survival/nano slug (each <= $0.05 USDC) auto-pays. transcribe-extract and doc-extract are excluded by default because they need a caller-supplied input the zero-arg tool cannot pass (call /api/bar/x402/transcribe and /api/bar/x402/extract directly); name them explicitly here to opt in. Set a comma list to RESTRICT. Safety is enforced by the per-call/session caps, not this list.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_X402_ALLOW_SLUGS

title: MCP 401 Auth Fix | github PAT wiring | x402
